name: Jira
description: Monitor Jira Cloud project access, user roles, and permission schemes for compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to https://id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
2. Click "Create API token" (not "Create API token with scopes")
3. Name the token and set an expiry date, then copy it
4. Enter your Atlassian account email and the token below
5. Enter your Jira subdomain in each check (e.g. mycompany from mycompany.atlassian.net)

Important: Use an API token WITHOUT scopes (classic token). Scoped API tokens require a different API URL that is not currently supported. If you see empty results or errors, verify you created a token without scopes.

credentialFields.label: Email Address
credentialFields.helpText: The email address associated with your Atlassian account

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Reviews active Jira users and their access for compliance

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Verifies that Jira projects have proper type and access configurations
